deploy.startCommand: sh -c "API_URL=\"${PUBLIC_API_URL:-$BACKEND_URL}\"; printf 'window.__BAZARIO_CONFIG__ = { API_URL: \"%s\" };\\n' \"$API_URL\" > /usr/share/nginx/html/runtime-config.js && envsubst '$PORT $BACKEND_URL' < /etc/nginx/templates/default.conf.template > /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf && exec nginx -g 'daemon off;'"
